name: cugraph-pyg-cu12

metadata.name: cugraph-pyg-cu12
metadata.summary: cugraph-pyg - PyG support for cuGraph massive-scale, ultra-fast GPU graph analytics.

documentation:
# cugraph-pyg

## Description

cuGraph-PyG supports PyTorch Geometric (PyG) and implements PyG's GraphStore, FeatureStore, Loader, and Sampler interfaces.
